name: Architecture Approval Gate
description: HUMAN REVIEW checkpoint — pauses execution when running with --interactive. An operator reviews the auth + db design decisions before deployment configuration begins. Demonstrates needs-human-review mode.

checks.prompt: Produce an executive summary of the enterprise skeleton design decisions so far. Cover: (1) authentication approach, (2) database design, (3) security posture, (4) open questions that require human sign-off. Format as a concise briefing note.
checks.pass: ✅ Review summary prepared for human operator
checks.fail: ⚠️  Review summary could not be generated
